S.FORM: Charles Savarin I 1943 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 2 a romi'ad masofoc ci Charles Savarin, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Dominica anini i ci Charles Savarin, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 2 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô

S.FORM: Charles Savarin I 1943 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 2 a romi'ad masofoc ci Charles Savarin, malamikomoday a tamdaw.
